title: mk-code-index reconnecting session proxy
description: Port the mk-spec-memory reconnecting session proxy to mk-code-index so a code-index owner death reattaches to the respawned backend and replays in-flight read queries instead of surfacing a hard Connection closed. Adds a generic createClassifyFrame({replayableToolNames, unsafeToolNames}) factory to the shared proxy (default reproduces the mk-spec-memory sets, so memory behavior is unchanged); mk-code-index builds a code-graph classifier (read tools replay; code_graph_scan/code_graph_apply never replay) + a bridgeStdioThroughSessionProxy wrapper wired as the bridge, and gains a require.main guard so it is testable. Third of the deferred daemon-reliability hardening items from phase 017.
